summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. CommentHistorySection.tsx is updated to include an inline comment form with a textarea, PTP status selector (all 5 required options), submit/cancel logic, color-coding via STATUS_CONFIG, loading state via isSubmitting/Loader2, and validation. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: Validation error display for empty comment text or missing PTP status selection
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest did not specify inline validation error messages; it only required the form to be submittable and dismissible. The implementation adds a validationError state and displays error messages, which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: New comments are prepended (newest first) to the comment timeline rather than appended
hallucinated_features.reason: The AC states 'appends the new comment to the displayed comment timeline', but the implementation uses setComments((prev) => [newComment, ...prev]) which prepends. This is a minor deviation not explicitly requested.
